feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transfer between Storage Locations and plants (A&B)
entry.content:
the goal is to transfer quality stock between 2 plant using the same inspection lot.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SIC Code in Plant level
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community
I need to find the table/field of SIC code in a plant level. 
Similar to SIC Code for Item level which can be found in MVKE-MVGR1

Thank you

entry.title: Native HANA Information Views on Source system S4/HANA.
entry.content:
Hello,

As per SAP recommendation for S/4 HANA as a Business Suite, for Operational and Analytics reporting, CDS Views is the way to go. CDS views will then be consumed by Fiori apps and Embedded analytics. 

Since we have BW/4HANA in place and all the operational reporting is done there through Native HANA Calculation views, is it feasible to use these models by export import in Source system data base? what are pros and cons of creating HANA Graphical CALC views (information Views) directly on Source system?

What are differences in terms of performance and ease of consuming ABAP CDS views Vs HANA Information Views?

entry.title: Table ANLC and MKPF are found 0 number of entries in HANA but some number of entries via SE11
entry.content:
Dear SAP

Table ANLC and MKPF are found 0 number of entries in HANA but some number of entries via SE11。

I  need to access HANA Table ANLC and MKPF via JDBC,How I do it?Pls help me.

entry.title: SUM Queries
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there any way to find out what actually is copied to shadow system during upgrade? Some consultants say that data is copied whereas other say only structures are copied.

My query is:

1)Is data copied in shadow system or structures?

2)If data is copied, then is there any way to find out exactly what data is copied to shadow system?

 

Best Regards,

Darpan Kumar

entry.title: COPA - Account Based and Costing Based
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are having 2 company Codes for which both Controlling area and Operating concern are same, the business is asking for both account based and costing based COPA, Can anyone please explain if both are necessary and why?

entry.title: CDS view entity giving annotation error
entry.content:
I created a simple CDS view entity and for unknown reasons, it is giving me annotation errors such as 'Annotation 'AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory' used at wrong position (wrong scope)'.

So, I created another CDS view entity with a different name (but in the same package) and exactly the same query, and it activated without any errors.

I have attached a screenshot of the two CDS view entities below:

Kindly help in resolving this weird issue.

entry.title: Manage work center capacity for maintenance order
entry.content:
Dear,

When implementing SAP Asset Management S/4HANA Public Edition for a client, one of the requests is the following: being able to check the capacities available of a work center before assigning hours to an operation.

I know that there is the Work Center Utilization app via the license Resource Scheduling (43R) but we want to know if there is an equivalent to check the capacities without this license.

I have found a Production tile: Manage Work Center Capacity. I have defined, in My Area Of Responsibility, a work center group that I have created by including my maintenance work center in it.

The issue that I have is that I do not see the percentage of the utilization of my maintenance operations, yet I cannot see the work planned (see my pictures attached) > the utilization is empty for my work center RES-0100; Capacities are available in the header of my work center & my maintenance order operations are either ready to schedule or dispatched already.

Can you please help and let me know if there is a configuration missing or another alternative to check capacity planning without the Resource Scheduling app?

Thank you,

Dany R.

entry.title: Security Activities to be performed in GRC system as we have migrated to S/4 HANA from ECC
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone please explain the Security activities to be performed in GRC system as we have upgraded our system to S/4 HANA from ECC.

BR,

Lokesh T

entry.title: Message no. KA465
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How can this be resolved?

 

Production order with an actual activity update.

Message no. KA465

Diagnosis

In the plan, activity updates are relevant to price determination. The system uses a multi-level price determination in actual costing. In actual costing, the system already debited materials and credited the cost centers, and vice versa.

System Response

The system does not execute revaluation, to avoid posting the credits and debits twice.

entry.title: FSCM credit management: automatic release of deliveries with prepayments
entry.content:
Dear experts,
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I have questions regarding the following process:
a customer has no credit limit and pays always in advance. The prepayment amount covers the order/ delivery amount, so that the credit limit check is generally positive. But the concerned deliveries always land up in SCASE and need to get unblocked manually. Is this the standard process? (I understand, if yes, because it's better to control it every time instead of trusting the customer. I just want the confirmation, as I haven't found any possibility to change the process 😊)
We would prefer, that such deliveries will not get blocked, when the prepayment is available and the amount equal or higher than the delivery. 
The same logic can be applied, when the customer balance is sufficient - I mean, when customer has overpayments or credit notes (debit > credit). Does SAP standard provide any possibility to set it up - by customizing, by BAdI, by user exit or else? 
 
Thanks a lot and best regards, Carina

entry.title: FSCM credit management: credit check step 140
entry.content:
Dear all, 
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I found the new check step "140 check credit limit validity" in OSS note 2926009 and I would like to know:
  • what exactly does this step do? Could anyone explain with an example? 
  • would is be possible to implement this step also to our release 20/21 SPS3, although it's mentioned, that it's available in a later release? 
Many thanks in advance and best regards, Carina

entry.title: Customer Data Browser Fiori app for S/4Hana On-Premise environment?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We were analyzing the Customer Data Browser apps for S/4Hana 2023 On-Premise environment. I can find the apps and related mappings in Content Manager, however few related settings seems to be unavailable related to restrictions on object levels.

I wanted to understand if we can use this app on on-premise S/4Hana environment? In Fiori Apps Library I see its available only for S/4Hana Cloud, however the Tile and contents are also available on On-Premise and seems to be working for data preview.

Any suggestions would be helpful here for us in making the decision on this app usage in our on-premise environment.

Thanks,

Rakesh

entry.title: Five Key assessments for a Smooth ECC to S/4HANA Transformation
entry.content:
Greetings to all!           

      Embarking on the journey from an existing SAP ERP system to SAP S/4HANA can be a complex and daunting task. The transition involves assessing the current landscape, understanding the implications of the move, and preparing for the changes ahead. In the initial phase of this transformation, focusing on key strategies can help streamline the process and set the stage for a successful transition. Here, we discuss five essential assessments that organizations can do to navigate this transformation effectively, ensuring minimal disruption and maximum benefit.

Also when initiating a system conversion project, time and effort estimation are crucial to ensure the project stays on track. However, achieving accurate estimations can be challenging without data-driven actions.

To simplify this process, we can perform five key assessments:

  1. Business Transformation Assessment
  2. Landscape Assessment
  3. Process Assessment
  4. Custom Objects Assessment
  5. Timeline Assessment

Let's get started

1. Business Transformation Assessment

Without a proper understanding of the landscape and the knowledge of how each of the processes is affected, it is literally impossible to build a proper digital transformation plan.

Collect all the business processes from the legacy system and organize them hierarchically into the following levels

L1 – Line of business

L2 – Process group

L3 – Scope item

L4 – Process variant

L5 – Process step

And conduct a materiality analysis of all the Functional Modules. This will help you identify the heavily used modules and the rarely used modules in the existing landscape. The primary purpose of this analysis is to understand the AS-IS state.

2. Landscape Assessment

 2.1  Active vs Inactive Users
         Find out the total number of SAP ERP users and classify them into active and inactive users based on their activity. As a result, this section gives you an analytical view of all the users present in the system and helps you make the right decision with respect to license purchase before moving to S/4HANA.

 2.2 Add-on Analytics   

        Your transition from ECC to S/4HANA can be hindered by an incompatible add-on. All add-ons must be certified to run on S/4HANA. For SAP's own add-ons or those sold through SAP's pricelist, you can directly request the status of add-ons and additional packages from SAP. However, SAP is not responsible for independent third-party add-ons.

 2.3 Archiving List

       Archiving in SAP refers to the process of moving data that is no longer actively used or needed for daily operations to a separate storage location. This helps reduce the size of the production database, improve system performance, and ensure compliance with legal and regulatory requirements regarding data retention.

3. Process Assessment

 3.1 Enterprise Structure Mining

    Enterprise Structure Mining assessments are crucial for understanding the current organizational setup, including the number of company codes, sales organizations, purchase organizations, and other key elements. This information is used to identify opportunities for streamlining processes, improving efficiency, and aligning the SAP system with the organization's strategic objectives.

For example, in the case of Sales documents, the analysis drills down from company codes, sales organizations, distribution channels, plants, and all the way up to the sales documents.                                     

 3.2 Complexity Analysis

     Analyze the complexity of the system in terms of parameters such as the New G/L, Special Purpose Ledger, Material Ledger, Multi-Currency model, and Business Partners that are active in the existing landscape.

 

 3.3 Simplification Item Check

       Simplification analysis is a crucial step in preparing for an SAP S/4HANA conversion. It involves assessing the potential adaptation work needed to transition from SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA at a functional level. This analysis helps identify simplification items, which are changes or adaptations required for business processes and custom developments to align with SAP S/4HANA's functionalities and best practices. The analysis provides insights into the impact of these changes, helping organizations plan and execute their conversion projects effectively.

 3.4  Training Plan

        In a system conversion project like transitioning to SAP S/4HANA, it's crucial to prioritize training for end-users. Often, the focus is on the technical aspects of the project, but neglecting user training can lead to challenges post-implementation. To ensure a successful transition, create a comprehensive training plan that includes scenario-based training and onboard end-users early in the process. This approach not only prepares users for the new system but also helps in embracing a mindset shift towards leveraging SAP S/4HANA for success in the digital economy.

4. Custom Objects Assessment

     In the Custom Objects Assessment, the goal is to identify all custom objects in the system. These custom objects may not be readable in the S/4HANA system, potentially requiring significant time for adaptation. By the end of this assessment, you should have the total number of custom objects, modules with a high number of custom objects, total impacted objects, and total impacted cases. This information is crucial for planning and executing the transition to SAP S/4HANA effectively.

5. Timeline/Effort Assessment

 5.1  Timeline Assessment

Timeline Assessment involves planning the project timeline based on team size, assessment results, and project scope. It includes creating a high-level roadmap for the SAP S/4HANA system conversion process, validating it with solution architects and project managers, and charting out a detailed plan for the conversion project. This step is crucial for setting realistic deadlines, milestones, and sub-phase timelines to ensure the project stays on track and is completed successfully.  

 5.2 Effort Estimation

 Effort Estimation in the context of SAP S/4HANA conversion refers to accurately predicting the resources and efforts required for the conversion project. It involves identifying the necessary preparation and pre-checks in the current system landscape, estimating HANA database and hardware sizing, and quantifying the IT effort needed for the transition. This helps in optimizing the total cost of conversion and deploying the right resources for a successful SAP S/4HANA realization.

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Upgrade HANA DB with Vector DB
entry.content:
What has to be installed in order to get the vector DB functions in HANA DB on premise?

Thx.

entry.title: Can we develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premises System?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement that we need to develop an Ashynchronus API in the S/4 Hana On-Premise system. Is it possible or not?

entry.title: Create new system copyng existing system
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to create a new Sandbox S/4 Hana 2021 system with an existing S/4 Hana source system

Usually I use "Refresh or Move database Instance" to copy an origin system to an existing target system.

In my new scenario, new system from scratch, do I need to

  1. install a fresh S/4 Hana 2021 system
  2. execute  "Refresh or Move database Instance"  

?

Could I do in only one run, instead?

Thanks a lot

Mario

entry.title: PS budget migration from legacy system
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

If it possible to migrate PS full budget data (original budget/ budget consumption) from legacy system to a new S/4HANA system. For example : WBS in legacy system the original budget = 1000, consumption = 800, available = 200. In general, I will only migrate original budget = 200 to new system, because I will not migrate all the detail transactions of the WBS. But my customer's requirement is migrate  original budget = 1000, consumption = 800 to new system because they want to trace the full cycle in new system. If someone have the same experience? By the way, the WBS is real WBS not statistic.

Thanks and Best Regards,

entry.title: How can we create a customer influence in S/4HANA for P2P
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone give me the right link to post a customer influence for S/4 in Procurement? 

We need to raise a business needs for the creation of a vendor calendar in order to :

- Put the holiday of the supplier on this calendar

- Based on these holidays, create pop up to users

- Based on these holiday, to have a link in MRP for the planning.

I only find the link to customer influence S/4 private, and no purchasing area inside.

Thank you

Ingrid
